name: morphy_bijou
headline: Morphy's Hidden Gem! 💎
hook_text: White to move: Can you find the move that left the world speechless?
details: A legendary puzzle by Paul Morphy. It features a stunning rook sacrifice to force a pawn mate.

youtube_metadata.title: Paul Morphy's Most Famous Puzzle! ⚡ #Shorts
youtube_metadata.description:
A 10-year-old prodigy created this masterpiece. Can you solve it?

Solution: 1. Ra6! bxa6 2. b7#

name: blackburne_quiet_move
headline: The Silent Killer! 🤫
hook_text: White to move: No checks, no captures, just a win.
details: Joseph Blackburne demonstrates the power of a 'quiet move'. By repositioning the Bishop, Black is left helpless.

youtube_metadata.title: The Power of a Quiet Move! ♟️ #Shorts
youtube_metadata.description:
Not every winning move is a check. Blackburne shows how to weave a mating net.

Solution: 1. Ba3! Ka2 2. Bc1#

name: heathcote_zugzwang
headline: The Zugzwang Trap! 🕸️
hook_text: White to move: Force your opponent to defeat themselves.
details: Godfrey Heathcote's masterpiece. White makes a move that forces Black into a fatal En Passant response.

youtube_metadata.title: The Ultimate Zugzwang! 🤯 #Shorts
youtube_metadata.description:
Watch how Black is forced to commit suicide on the board. 

Solution: 1. Be8! f5 2. exf6 e.p.#
